description: Obtain three distinct 'Travel' or 'National Parks' WPA posters from the Library of Congress (loc.gov) collection of 'Photos, Prints, Drawings' dated between the 1930s and 1950s. Save the highest resolution JPEG for each poster to ~/Pictures/WPA_Travel/ and generate a manifest file at ~/Pictures/WPA_Travel/manifest.json containing an array of objects with keys 'title', 'year', 'url', and 'filename' for the downloaded items.
